intro: Not a CV. A line from the first thing I designed to the practice I run now.

milestones.label: Started designing and building
milestones.body: Designing and building on the web. Graphic design, logos, branding, event and web work.

milestones.label: Built the digital practice
milestones.body: Built the digital practice single-handedly. Instructional design, Articulate Rise and Storyline, e-learning production, workshop and leadership-programme design.
proof: Set up GDP's digital practice from scratch.
Grew it to approximately 25% of business revenue.
Onboarded approximately 30 digital clients over 6 years.
Delivered approximately 50 bespoke e-learning modules for clients including Fortune 500 organisations.
Designed and delivered 2 modules end-to-end for Shell, reaching more than 100,000 learners around the world.

milestones.label: AI artisan & automation practitioner
milestones.body: AI artisan and automation practitioner. Turning new AI capabilities into real business workflows.
